TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == qparung == uru hiya' ga helaw balay hbkgan na qparung labing ru blhuy. gluw na qparung utux ka lokah na qqhuniq. qparung hiya' ga, mrkyas qutux qutux ryax. ini' ptnaq sa ruma' ka qutux kawas ga mnxal mk'ali'. pusing hiya' ga, gluw na qparung utux ka lokah na qqhuniq. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'​ 杉木
S.PHON: == qparuŋ == uru ħijaʔ ɣa ħelaw βalaj ħβkɣan na qparuŋ laβiŋ ru βlħuj. ɣluw na qparuŋ utux ka lokaħ na qqħuniq. qparuŋ ħijaʔ ɣa, mrkjas~ɕ qutux qutux rjax. iniʔ ptnaq s~ɕa rumaʔ ka qutux kawas~ɕ ɣa mnxal mkʔaliʔ. pus~ɕiŋ ħijaʔ ɣa, ɣluw na qparuŋ utux ka lokaħ na qqħuniq. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ* **
S.FORM: == qparung == uru hiya' ga helaw balay hbkgan na qparung labing ru blhuy. gluw na qparung utux ka lokah na qqhuniq. qparung hiya' ga, mrkyas qutux qutux ryax. ini' ptnaq sa ruma' ka qutux kawas ga mnxal mk'ali'. pusing hiya' ga, gluw na qparung utux ka lokah na qqhuniq. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'​ 杉木
S.PHON: == qparuŋ == uru ħijaʔ ɣa ħelaw βalaj ħβkɣan na qparuŋ laβiŋ ru βlħuj. ɣluw na qparuŋ utux ka lokaħ na qqħuniq. qparuŋ ħijaʔ ɣa, mrkjas~ɕ qutux qutux rjax. iniʔ ptnaq s~ɕa rumaʔ ka qutux kawas~ɕ ɣa mnxal mkʔaliʔ. pus~ɕiŋ ħijaʔ ɣa, ɣluw na qparuŋ utux ka lokaħ na qqħuniq. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ* **
